# Agent Instructions — Reading Order

Before writing or modifying code in this repository, read these files **in order**:

1. [`.github/copilot-instructions.md`](../copilot-instructions.md) — mandatory system constraints, architecture rules, governance locks
2. [`CODING_RULES.md`](CODING_RULES.md) — mechanical-refactor policy, verification gates, comment style, boundary conventions
3. [`SOURCE_STRUCTURE.md`](SOURCE_STRUCTURE.md) — repo layout, entrypoints, folder ownership, frozen contract baselines
